reviews.review_description: I was scrolling through the apps when i found this game i like i am cat and so i thought oh ill just play a little bit you know. Butttttttttttt i didn't think id like it this much. So I'm going to give you an honest review 1. The movement is a little glitched but that's most of it its a little hard to move but overall very good i see this game getting popular very quick with how much effort it look like it took the 2 thing i don't dislike it but i wish you could do something about it I'm talking about the music in the house i was thinking of changing the music its fine but i think the ability to change it would be nice 😄.  the puzzles are a challenge but not impossible its a really good balance the one I'm stumped on is the blue key shrine 😓 i got one but could not find the rest now my last problem is that when i log on again it resets the shrines i don't really like that but its not a big problem tho 😁💜
